channel.title: BAND-MAID Social Mentions
channel.description: BAND-MAID mentions from across social media.

item.title: [BlueSky] I am not sure I have enough all women for 10 but:
item.dc:creator: Tray Dawg (traydawg.bsky.social)
item.description:
I am not sure I have enough all women for 10 but:

Kittie (they were VERY cringe at the time)
BAND-MAID
Mary Chapin Carpenter
Chantal Kreviazuk

And probably some Christian artists whose names I've forgotten by now back when I listened to Christian music lol

BlueSky · traydawg.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] introduce yourself with 10 bands you've seen live
item.dc:creator: Sparkling Wide Depression (serenawanderer.bsky.social)
item.description:
introduce yourself with 10 bands you've seen live

Metallica
dc Talk
Reliant K
Evanescence
Dream Theater
Blind Guardian
Iron Maiden
Band-Maid
Lacuna Coil
The Warning

Chronological order of first time seeing them to the best I can remember. Very “two of these are not like the others”.

BlueSky · serenawanderer.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] Band Maid: Endless Story [Live]
item.dc:creator: Sam Inglis (24fpsuk.bsky.social)
item.description:
Band Maid: Endless Story [Live]
The closer of their 3 1/2 hour, 33 song 10th anniversary show, extended with a specially written verse. I saw it live online, and you bet I was crying along with the band members. Subs on for this one.

BlueSky · 24fpsuk.bsky.social

The Duke Spirit
Sons and Daughters

item.title: [BlueSky] Forza Horizon 6やりたくて、Xbox Game Passに加入したよ。
item.dc:creator: Hayato (yamatoren.bsky.social)
item.description:
Forza Horizon 6やりたくて、Xbox Game Passに加入したよ。
ラジオ局でBABYMETAL、BAND-MAID、PassCode流れてて、めっちゃテンション上がるー！

BlueSky · yamatoren.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] Easy choice for me, especially as they are so prolific and generate new music...
item.dc:creator: Barry McKinnon (rockyuphill.bsky.social)
item.description:
Easy choice for me, especially as they are so prolific and generate new music releases every year. They already have 150+ songs in their no-skip catalog and another new release coming in a few weeks. It is... drum roll... Band-Maid. 😊🤘

BlueSky · rockyuphill.bsky.social

item.dc:creator: JaME France (jameworldfr.bsky.social)
item.description:
#Jrock #bandmaid #ENERGETIC

Le groupe de hard rock BAND-MAID sortira son tout premier single de 2026, intitulé "ENERGETIC", le 24 juin.

www.jame-world.com/fr/news/1712...

item.title: [BlueSky] Really loving the XS Radio in Forza Horizon 6 with Babymetal, Poppy, Band-Mai...
item.dc:creator: Tao Of Chaos (taoofchaos.bsky.social)
item.description:
Really loving the XS Radio in Forza Horizon 6 with Babymetal, Poppy, Band-Maid, Linkin Park, A Day To Remember, Coheed & Cambria, One OK Rock, Passcode, Pendulum, Rise Against, Sleep Theory, Spiritbox and Turnstile. Exactly my Jam 😍

BlueSky · taoofchaos.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] I would like an era of Band Maid where we have Kanami solo's that last severa...
item.dc:creator: Oftentimes Jack 🇮🇪🤝🇵🇸 (pepsffk.bsky.social)
item.description:
I would like an era of Band Maid where we have Kanami solo's that last several minutes, just those empty opening metal solos but actually good.

www.youtube.com/watch?v=GZ9R...

item.title: [BlueSky] I have yet to hear any Band Maid or Babymetal. Keeps feeding me this techno e...
item.dc:creator: Defyeler Blackheart (畢家俊) (defyeler.bsky.social)
item.description:
I have yet to hear any Band Maid or Babymetal. Keeps feeding me this techno edm shit. I don't see radio stations, just the annoying announcer that keeps repeating what I just did.

item.title: [BlueSky] of BAND-MAID’s songs. Guitar heroes cannot resist a seeming guitar heroine (l...
item.dc:creator: Band-Maid Song of the Day Bot (bandmaidsongbot.bsky.social)
item.description:
of BAND-MAID’s songs. Guitar heroes cannot resist a seeming guitar heroine (laughs).

Kanami: Boss (Saiki) will say "Putting more solos in is good" (laughs). I also received advice on guitar tech side and playing method whilst playing myself, but I think that I could still level up as a guitarist to

BlueSky · bandmaidsongbot.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] t the lyrics will remain in your ears, until now we haven’t written songs for...
item.dc:creator: Band-Maid Song of the Day Bot (bandmaidsongbot.bsky.social)
item.description:
t the lyrics will remain in your ears, until now we haven’t written songs for BAND-MAID like that.

— The word "secret" comes out, is secret love is the theme?

Saiki: I agree. The content is pretty deep. A woman with a really condescending attitude is the protagonist (laughs).

Miku: It is the very

BlueSky · bandmaidsongbot.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] This album is really the beginning of Band Maid as they are today: it closes ...
item.dc:creator: Sam Inglis (24fpsuk.bsky.social)
item.description:
This album is really the beginning of Band Maid as they are today: it closes with Alone, the first of Kanami's compositions to make it on to one of their albums, and still one of their best songs, IMO.

BlueSky · 24fpsuk.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] Woo Hoo!".
item.dc:creator: Band-Maid Song of the Day Bot (bandmaidsongbot.bsky.social)
item.description:
Woo Hoo!".

Kobato: The way the tension rises when I say the title or play the intro before the performance is amazing. It's a slow song which is unusual for BAND-MAID but overseas, the audience just goes wild.

Saiki: Also, in "Before Yesterday," everyone starts buzzing the moment the intro backtra

BlueSky · bandmaidsongbot.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] #MusicChallenge
item.dc:creator: SUgoiBxMxC1968 - Bass Player (babymetalfanatic.bsky.social)
item.description:
#MusicChallenge
Name 10 bands you've obsessed over at some point:
(11 for the price of 10)

1. Rush
2. Dream Theater
3. Fates Warning
4. Babymetal
5. Slayer
6. Depeche Mode
7. The Cure
8. Epica
9. Band-Maid
10. Jinjer
11. Yes

There are too many to list. This is what came off the top of my head.

BlueSky · babymetalfanatic.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] Band Maid is so impressive on every level it blows me away every time I liste...
item.dc:creator: Nuclear Boarhead🐗🏳️‍⚧️ (yuriswine.bsky.social)
item.description:
Band Maid is so impressive on every level it blows me away every time I listen to them or watch their live videos and I want to see them live so badly some day. Incredible artists 💜💜💜💜💜💜💜
youtu.be/iaf94nNSRGE?...

BlueSky · yuriswine.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] granted, horizon XS has... band-maid, babymetal and one ok rock. which isn't ...
item.dc:creator: mae✨ (maesekiha.bsky.social)
item.description:
granted, horizon XS has... band-maid, babymetal and one ok rock. which isn't Bad but is pretty basic. i guess i appreciate ADTR, rise against and spiritbox being there even if they're not japanese

item.title: [BlueSky] — I can’t live without you. must be an exciting song at servings. Will you be...
item.dc:creator: Band-Maid Song of the Day Bot (bandmaidsongbot.bsky.social)
item.description:
— I can’t live without you. must be an exciting song at servings. Will you be able to sing it?

Saiki: I’ll be able to sing it easily before the next serving, probably?

Miku Kobato: We Band-Maid are basically like that. First, we train ourselves at recording and record our best, then we practice by

BlueSky · bandmaidsongbot.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] Nouvel album annoncé pour le groupe #BANDMAID. "ENERGETIC" sortira le 24/06 e...
item.dc:creator: Xavier F. (fxmaccobra.bsky.social)
item.description:
Nouvel album annoncé pour le groupe #BANDMAID. "ENERGETIC" sortira le 24/06 et est disponible en pré-commande
RE: www.cdjapan.co.jp/product/PCCA...
LE(DVD): www.cdjapan.co.jp/product/PCCA...
LE(BD): www.cdjapan.co.jp/product/PCCA...

Le groupe sera en concert au Bataclan (Paris) le 09/06.

BlueSky · fxmaccobra.bsky.social
